conclusion: Exact overlap exists for ordinary Argentina-wins-2026-World-Cup semantics across SX Bet, Kalshi, and Polymarket. Exceptional cancellation and non-completion handling differs in public text and is documented as a limitation; the app uses this only for read-only paper routing, not settlement.
exceptionalResolutionConclusion: Kalshi exposes a 2028 technical close/expiration while also exposing a 2026 expected expiration and early close after title holder declaration. Polymarket exposes an Other outcome for cancellation/not completed by 2026-10-13. SX Bet exposes NO_GAME in the public payload. These differences are visible in the witness and do not authorize settlement claims.

observations.title: Argentina vs The Field - Outrights - World Cup
observations.resolutionNotes: Tournament-winner exposure: Argentina vs field for World Cup outright.

observations.title: Will the Argentina win the 2026 Men's World Cup?
observations.resolutionNotes: YES resolves if Argentina wins the 2026 Men's World Cup.

observations.title: Will Argentina win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
observations.resolutionNotes: YES resolves according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
